name_en: Premium Original Leather M23950 Black Small. This Capucines BB Handbag features the exquisite Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather constructs the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant aura. Dimensions: 27 × 18 × 9 cm
